name: smart-contract-methods-const
description: Monorepo containing NEAR smart contract method constants packages

scripts.publish:all: for pkg in berryclub-contract-methods-const ft-methods-const greeting-contract-methods-const hos-contracts-methods-const meme-cooking-contract-methods-const rhea-ref-exchange-methods-const social-near-contract-methods-const staking-pool-contract-methods-const wrap-near-contract-methods-const; do echo "\n📦 Publishing $pkg..."; cd "$pkg" && bun publish --access public && cd ..; done
